description: Add TheJacketMaker-style Mega Menu Dropdown Open Behavior settings (13 new settings) and Mega Menu Dropdown Style Variants settings (22 new settings) to the mega-navigation section. Total: 35 new settings for Area 5. This includes overlay behind dropdown, smooth height-grow animation, content stagger, open/close triggers with delays, and dropdown width/layout/styling options.
steps: STEP 1 - Add 35 new schema settings to sections/mega-navigation.liquid under new headers 'Dropdown Style Variants' and 'Dropdown Open Behavior'. Settings include: mn_dropdown_width (select: full-width/contained/boxed/auto), mn_dropdown_boxed_max_width (range 600-1400 step 50 default 1000), mn_dropdown_layout (select: columns-only/columns+promo-right/columns+promo-left/columns+promo-bottom/grid-images/tabbed), mn_dropdown_alignment (select: left/center/right), mn_dropdown_padding_h (range 20-80 step 5 default 40), mn_dropdown_padding_v (range 20-60 step 5 default 30), mn_dropdown_border_radius (range 0-16 step 2 default 0), mn_dropdown_border_width (range 0-3 step 1 default 0), mn_dropdown_border_color (color #E5E5E5), mn_dropdown_shadow_style (select: none/subtle/medium/strong/custom), mn_dropdown_bg_type (select: solid/gradient), mn_dropdown_gradient_start (color #FFFFFF), mn_dropdown_gradient_end (color #F5F5F5), mn_dropdown_gradient_direction (select: top-bottom/left-right/diagonal), mn_col_separator_lines (checkbox false), mn_col_separator_color (color #E5E5E5), mn_col_separator_style (select: solid/dashed/dotted), mn_col_heading_underline (checkbox true), mn_col_heading_underline_color (color #000000), mn_show_view_all (checkbox false), mn_view_all_style (select: text-arrow/button-small/underline), mn_view_all_color (color #000000), mn_open_trigger (select: hover-instant/hover-with-delay/click), mn_open_delay (range 0-400 step 50 default 100), mn_close_delay (range 0-500 step 50 default 200), mn_container_animation (select: instant/slide-down-smooth/height-grow/fade-slide/curtain-reveal), mn_content_animation (select: none/fade-in/fade-up/stagger-left/stagger-fade/blur-in), mn_content_stagger_delay (range 0-200 step 25 default 50), mn_animation_easing (select: ease/ease-in-out/smooth-cubic/bounce-subtle/spring), mn_show_overlay (checkbox false), mn_overlay_color (color #000000), mn_overlay_opacity (range 10-70 step 5 default 30), mn_close_on_scroll (checkbox false), mn_close_animation (select: same-as-open-reverse/fade-out/slide-up/instant), mn_dropdown_reveal_origin (select: top-left/top-center/top-full).

STEP 2 - Add CSS variables in the mega-navigation.liquid style block for all 35 new settings. Map each setting to a --mn-* variable. For mn_overlay_opacity (range 10-70), output the value divided by 100 using Liquid math: {{ section.settings.mn_overlay_opacity | divided_by: 100.0 }}.

STEP 3 - Add data attributes on the .mega-navigation-section div for JS-driven settings: data-mn-open-trigger, data-mn-container-animation, data-mn-content-animation, data-mn-close-on-scroll, data-mn-close-animation, data-mn-dropdown-width.

STEP 4 - Update assets/mega-navigation.css to implement the new dropdown style variants: (a) Width variants (contained uses max-width from var, boxed centers with max-width, auto uses fit-content). (b) Border radius, border width/color from vars. (c) Shadow variants (subtle/medium/strong with different box-shadow values). (d) Gradient background option. (e) Column separator lines. (f) Column heading underline toggle. (g) Dropdown alignment. (h) Padding from vars. (i) Transform-origin based on reveal origin.

STEP 5 - Update assets/mega-navigation.css to implement the new dropdown open behavior animations: (a) slide-down-smooth: translateY(-100%) to translateY(0) with height clip. (b) height-grow: max-height animation from 0 to auto (use scaleY or clip-path for smooth effect). (c) fade-slide: opacity + translateY. (d) curtain-reveal: clip-path from inset(0 0 100% 0) to inset(0). (e) Content animations: fade-in, fade-up, stagger-left (each column staggers), stagger-fade, blur-in. (f) Close animations. (g) Easing values mapped to actual cubic-bezier curves.

STEP 6 - Update assets/mega-navigation.css to add the overlay behind dropdown: A .mega-nav-overlay element (or ::before on section) that appears when dropdown is active, with configurable color and opacity.

STEP 7 - Update assets/mega-navigation.js to implement the new open behavior: (a) Replace hardcoded HOVER_OPEN_DELAY/HOVER_CLOSE_DELAY with values from data attributes (mn_open_delay, mn_close_delay). (b) Support click trigger (toggle .is-active on click instead of hover). (c) Support hover-instant (delay=0). (d) Implement close-on-scroll (add scroll listener that closes active dropdowns). (e) Handle overlay show/hide. (f) Add stagger delay to content columns via JS (set --mn-stagger-index on each column). (g) Container animation class toggling.

STEP 8 - Update sections/mega-navigation.liquid HTML to add the overlay element:
inside .mega-navigation-section, positioned fixed behind the dropdown.
STEP 9 - Validate all schemas parse correctly and CSS/JS have balanced braces.
acceptance_criteria: mega-navigation.liquid schema contains exactly 35 new settings (total section settings goes from 33 to 68)
All range settings have defaults that are valid steps from their min value
CSS variables for all 35 settings are output in the Liquid style block
The dropdown supports 4 width modes: full-width (100vw), contained (max-width centered), boxed (max-width from setting), auto (fit-content)
At least 5 container animation types are implemented in CSS with proper keyframes/transitions
Content stagger animation applies incrementing delay to each .mega-nav-column child
Overlay appears behind dropdown when mn_show_overlay is true and a dropdown is active
Open trigger supports hover-instant, hover-with-delay, and click modes
Close-on-scroll removes .is-active from all dropdowns on window scroll
verification: Run: python3 -c "import json; schema=open('sections/mega-navigation.liquid').read().split('{% schema %}')[1].split('{% endschema %}')[0]; data=json.loads(schema); settings=[s for s in data['settings'] if s.get('type') != 'header']; print(f'Section settings count: {len(settings)}'); assert len(settings) >= 60, f'Expected >= 60, got {len(settings)}'"
Run: python3 -c "css=open('assets/mega-navigation.css').read(); assert css.count('{') == css.count('}'), f'Unbalanced: {css.count("{")} vs {css.count("}")}'; print('CSS OK')"
Run: python3 -c "js=open('assets/mega-navigation.js').read(); assert js.count('{') == js.count('}'), f'Unbalanced: {js.count("{")} vs {js.count("}")}'; print('JS OK')"

Run: python3 -c "css=open('assets/mega-navigation.css').read(); assert '--mn-dropdown-padding-h' in css or '--mn-dropdown-pad-h' in css; assert 'height-grow' in css or 'heightGrow' in css; assert 'stagger' in css; print('Key CSS patterns found')"
findings: All 35 new settings added successfully. Total non-header section settings is now 65 (30 original + 35 new). The acceptance criteria mentioned 33 original settings but that likely included headers - the actual non-header count was 30. All verifications pass: JSON schema parses, CSS braces balanced, JS braces balanced, key patterns present. CSS uses attribute selectors for animation types and style attribute selectors for gradient/easing values. The JS now supports click trigger mode (preventing default on links with dropdowns), hover-instant mode (0 delay), configurable delays from CSS vars, close-on-scroll, overlay management, and stagger index application.
